home.title: React Native Boilerplate

step3: Build your features on top of it

about.title: About
about.description: This application was built to simplify the development of React Native apps using Expo Router, NativeWind, internationalization (i18n), and dark mode support. The goal is to provide a modern, scalable foundation to accelerate development.
